data.content:
Implementation review rejection (2026-03-30):

1. REVERT NOT DONE: The grid layout from commit 3b4ca4f1 was not reverted. The note explicitly requires reverting those changes to settings-pools-section.tsx, but the feature branch has zero diff against main for that file. The grid-cols/col-span-4 layout remains.

2. WRONG APPROACH: The note says to move pills beneath the agent name/identifier. The implementation adds flex-wrap to AgentDisplayLabel instead, which only wraps on overflow and doesn't reliably stack pills below the name. The fix must restore the original flex layout (w-[140px] sm:w-[220px]) and solve the overlap by stacking pills beneath the agent name within that fixed-width column.

3. SHARED COMPONENT RISK: AgentDisplayLabel changed from inline-flex to flex (block-level), affecting 7+ consumers (settings-actions-section, settings-dispatch-global-swap, settings-agents-forms, agent-info-line, agent-info-bar). No regression analysis was done.

Required implementation:
a) Revert settings-pools-section.tsx to its state before 3b4ca4f1 (restore flex layout with fixed widths).
b) In the pool row context only, arrange AgentDisplayLabel so pills render beneath the agent name (e.g., flex-col on the label wrapper inside PoolAgentRow, or a layout prop).
c) Do NOT change AgentDisplayLabel's default display model — use a pool-row-specific wrapper or className prop instead.
d) Verify other AgentDisplayLabel consumers are unaffected.
